visual_analysis.description: A green soda can with 'Sprite' written on it, located on the left.
A black soda can to the right of the green can.
A red soda can with 'Coca-Cola' written on it, in the middle.
A white and purple soda can with 'Milk's' written on it.
A gold-colored plastic bottle with a light blue cap, on the right.

action_plan.explanation: The user requested sprite, and the green soda can is clearly visible and unobstructed.
